notes: v0.16.7 — Module art polish pass. All 30 module PNGs re-processed with alpha threshold 110 to kill the AI-rendered orange glow halo (visible as an orange border on the STANDARD DRIVE etc.). Texture-size multiplier dropped from 2.10x to 1.05x so icons no longer overflow slot card panels. Compare popup now shows the new texture instead of the small procedural circle. Library hex tiles now show the texture for ALL modules (locked ones dimmed to 40% alpha) so the whole catalog reads as art, not generic outlines. MODULES → SHIP CLASS picker buttons gained ship texture icons (active class's active skin per class). HOME daily mission card now sources its objective text + PULSE reward from DAILY_TEMPLATES (was hardcoded '+200 PULSE · +1 BOSS KEY' regardless of which mission was active) — matches what QUESTS shows. Windows only.
